zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippa Mathilde de Toulouse於1073年10月22日出生在法國米迪-列內斯豪-加洛圖勞斯時，她的父親Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse34歲，母親Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse15歲。她於1089年與Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine在法國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1118年11月28日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易享年45歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippa Mathilde de Toulouse于1073年10月22日出生在法国米迪-列內斯豪-加洛圖勞斯时，她的父亲Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse34岁，母亲Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse15岁。她于1089年与Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine在法国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1118年11月28日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易享年45岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toulouse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Monique, Camile, Emile, Gilles, Marcel, Rosaire.

French and English: habitational name from Toulouse, the name of several places in the southwestern part of France, most notably the city in Haute-Garonne, the capital of this French department and of the region of Occitanie.

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippa Mathilde de Toulouse was born on 22 October 1073, in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France, her father, Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse, was 34 and her mother, Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse, was 15. She married Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine in 1089, in France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 28 November 1118, in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 45, and was buried in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippa Mathilde de Toulouse est née le 22 octobre 1073, à Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France, son père, Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine en 1089, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 novembre 1118, à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippa Mathilde de Toulouse am 22. Oktober 1073 in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse 34 und ihre Mutter Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse 15. Sie hat 1089 in Frankreich Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. November 1118 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Mathilde de Toulouse è nata il il 22 ottobre 1073 nel Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine nel 1089, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 28 novembre 1118, nel Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippa Mathilde de Toulouseが1073年10月22日にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスハウテ-ガーオントウロウゼで生まれた時，父Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouseは34歳，母Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouseは15歳であった。1089年にフランスでGuillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1118年11月28日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイで45歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa Mathilde de Toulouse(이)가 1073년 10월 22일 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 하테-가니 토우루스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1089년 프랑스에서 Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1118년 11월 28일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이에 묻혔다.

pt.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.Fontevraud-l'Abbaye, Departement de Main: Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Mathilde de Toulouse nasceu em 22 de outubro de 1073, em Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, França, seu pai, Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine em 1089, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de novembro de 1118, em Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.Fontevraud-l'Abbaye, Departement de Main: фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippa Mathilde de Toulouse родилась 22 октября 1073 г. в местности тоулоус, хауте-гаронн, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine в 1089 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 28 ноября 1118 г. в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippa Mathilde de Toulouse nació el 22 de octubre de 1073, en Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, su papá, Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine en 1089, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 28 de noviembre de 1118, en Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
